span.p:
Progress events:
- bytes_transferred
- speed_bps
- eta_seconds
emitted every 500ms

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Backoff: 2^attempt seconds
Resume from last ACK offset
(concurrent writes: 4 streams)
